calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2007 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trish Abalos.
Matthew Witteeman, Esq. for Petitioner: Colleen Lewetzow, present as Guardian ad litem for: Richard Lwewtzow, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $905.29
Costs $3,094.71
A net balance of $1,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, Croker Main Branch, 1 Montgomery St., San Francisco, CA. 94104, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Matthew J. Witteman for plaintiff and moving party: Richard Lewetzow
James Frederick Hannawalt for defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Plaintiff Richard Lewetzow's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents is granted in part and denied in part. Defendant is ordered to provide a privilege log that identifies any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of either the attorney client or attorney work product privilege within 15 days of notice of this order. The motion is otherwise denied.

MODIFICATION: Notice to guardian of minor. Court will thereafter conduct an in camera review. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
